items.title: Hack suggests AI music generator Suno scraped YouTube for training data
items.summary: The hacker used an employee's credentials to access source code, which revealed how Suno scraped decades of audio.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Lionel Messi’s Final World Cup—and the Death of Early Retirement
items.summary: Argentina’s Lionel Messi was supposed to be done years ago. Now, sports science is helping soccer’s biggest stars rewrite the rules of aging.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Valve appears to be discontinuing self-repair parts for the LCD Steam Deck at iFixit
items.summary: An iFixit staffer told a Steam Deck user that the company had no plans to stock replacement OEM batteries.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
